film.title: Krishna Cottage
film.overview: After their car breaks down, a group of collegians are forced to take shelter in the mysterious Krishna Cottage for the night. Little do they know that the cottage is haunted by a spirit awaiting its lover.

dialogues.dialogue: You were boasting so much about your love. And now, you're after my love I haven't seen such a shameless girl like you, till date. I apologize to you on behalf of Shanti's behalf. Had I been in Shanti's place, I too, would've done the same thing.

It's unsaid. Neither have I been able to think of the end of this......story nor will I ever be able to know about it. That's why... that's why this story is incomplete, even today. I proudly dedicate this story book to your college. Principal, this room of the college......has been closed for years, isn't it? - Yes. This used to be the painting room.

Where are you going? C'mon, change the stepny. But, pal... - Your mother will be pleased with you. But, pal... - You couldn't become a mechanical engineer......at least become a mechanic and make your mother proud. Ok, bye. I'm coming. The door's open. Somebody must've kept it open, for us.
